name: You Don't Have Time
short_description: You Don’t Have Time is a first-person puzzle game taking place in a series of rooms filled with puzzles, will you have time to solve them one by one to discover the reason of your presence?
detailed_description:
You Don’t Have Time is a first-person puzzle game taking place in a series of rooms filled with puzzles, will you have time to solve them one by one to discover the reason of your presence?

  • The mouse click. That's all what you need to interact with the modules and hope to open the door.
  • 25 rooms with many procedural puzzles.
  • A game developed by one person in 6 months.

If you are stuck, you can see the solution for each room in videos here:
